channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree pruning and thining., 14th April
item.description:
The trees are overgrown and need some attention.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Roehampton Drive, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 346 Brampton road bexleyheath, 14th April
item.description:
Been here for ages. Marked out but not repaired

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brampton Road, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The Manor at Bickley Flyposter on Lamppost junction of Thornet Wood Road And Blackbrook Lane, 14th April
item.description:
The Manor at Bickley Flyposter on Lamppost. Please fine this company for littering our streets with their advertising junk. I’m sharing a what3words address to help you find this specific location. Tap to see exactly where it is: ///decreased.improving.trash https://w3w.co/decreased.improving.trash

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackbrook Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish skip on road for past 3 weeks, 14th April
item.description:
Rubbish skip jas been left on bellegrove road for past 3 + weeks. real risk of collision with passing vechiles. should be on driveway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside 31 danson road, 14th April
item.description:
There is a large dog bed and some plastic cabinet doors that have left outside number 31 danson road. This has been reported before ref-9264574. Please can someone look into this as its been there for around 2 weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothes, 14th April
item.description:
Been left overnight as a flytip

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bins not emptied, 14th April
item.description:
Black bins have again not emptied as part of the regular waste collection.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gadwall Way, Thamesmead

item.title: Fly tipping, 14th April
item.description:
Lots of bags of rubbish and some sort of barrier dumped here.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ankerdine Crescent, Plumstead

item.title: Lamp post outside number 41 has been knocked and tarmac is now lose, 14th April
item.description:
Lamppost outside 41 has been knocked and now lose at the bottom also it's moved
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ingleton Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste, 14th April
item.description:
There is dog poo on the pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Limesford Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Square at junction of Tennyson road and priory park road nw6, 14th April
item.description:
As you see in the picture a large piece of MDF or wood left leaning against the side of the raised bed. I moved to the edge of the square for collection.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Loose Manhole Covers, 14th April
item.description:
Hi, I have reported this problem previously and its still not fixed there is a number of loose manhole covers on evelyn street one of which is directly outside of my house, this makes it difficult to sleep as it clanks everytime a car drives over it. Please have someone review and fix the manhole covers,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 116, Evelyn Street, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging Trees, 14th April
item.description:
Hi, I have reported this a while ago and i was told that there was a schedule in place to cut the trees in Deptford Park. This was over a year ago and to date the overhanging trees from the park continue to overhang my garden, which blocks light and causes, leaves and branches to fall into my garden.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 116, Evelyn Street, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crash damaged car abandoned, 14th April
item.description:
Crash damaged car abandoned attracting ASB & people using the car for drugs

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tynemouth Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and boxes, 14th April
item.description:
General rubbish dumped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Mission Place, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next o Tesco's/Chipotle, 14th April
item.description:
This "temporary" reinstatement has been left for about two years now. It is ugly and uneven. Please can it be repaired properly? Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Tottenham Court Road, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on corner of Carysfort Rd and Indigo Mews, 14th April
item.description:
A dumbbell has been fly-tipped.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Carysfort Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Bike dumped, 14th April
item.description:
One bike dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 303, Finchley Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Keep Clear road markings are not visible, 14th April
item.description:
Keep Clear road markings are not visible and drivers do not keep it clear. It is unsafe and makes it hard to exit onto Streatham Common North.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Henry Tate Mews, Streatham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal crossover/dropped kerb, 14th April
item.description:
Illegal crossover recently constructed at 95 Chichester Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet
